rationale: The topics appear largely disconnected in the notes (romantic-partner sustainability compensation vs. algorithm aversion/task objectivity), which argues against a clear substantive theoretical link. However, both paper notes explicitly include Facebook ad field experiments with click-through outcomes, so the cited article could plausibly be serving as a methodological precedent. Given only a single DOI-level match and no in-text citation context, this is not safely droppable as an obvious mention-only case.
